message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **Melihat Surat BKD**

actor "AdministratorBKD" as AdministratorBKD
boundary "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard_V
boundary "SuratBKD_V" as SuratBKD_V
control "Admin_C" as Admin_C
control "BKD_C" as BKD_C
entity "SuratDisposisi_E" as SuratDisposisi_E

Admin_C -[dashed]-> Dashboard_V : **1** load->view()
Dashboard_V -[dashed]-> AdministratorBKD : **2** Halaman Dashboard
AdministratorBKD -[dashed]-> SuratBKD_V : **3** klik menu Surat BKD
SuratBKD_V -[dashed]-> BKD_C : **4** index()
BKD_C -[dashed]-> SuratDisposisi_E : **5**
SuratDisposisi_E -[dashed]-> BKD_C : **6**
BKD_C -[dashed]-> SuratBKD_V : **7** load->view()
SuratBKD_V -[dashed]-> AdministratorBKD : **8** Halaman Surat BKD

@enduml
```
